name: AI Lead Qualification Agent with Gmail and Google Sheets
description: Reads lead data from a Google Sheet, uses Claude AI to score and qualify each lead based on customizable criteria, sends personalized follow-up emails via Gmail for qualified leads, updates the sheet with scores, and posts a qualification summary to Slack.

source.originalName: Automate lead qualification with RetellAI Phone Agent, OpenAI GPT & Google Sheet

gmailKey.description: Gmail connection key for sending follow-up emails

spreadsheetId.description: Google Sheets spreadsheet ID with lead data (columns: Name, Email, Company, Role, Source, Notes)

qualificationCriteria.default: B2B SaaS companies, decision makers (VP/Director/C-level), company size 50-500 employees
qualificationCriteria.description: Ideal customer profile and qualification criteria

companyName.description: Your company name for follow-up emails

steps.name: Read lead data from Google Sheets
Parse lead data for AI processing
Build Claude prompt for lead qualification
Parse Claude output and strip fences
Filter to only Hot and Warm leads for follow-up
Send follow-up emails to qualified leads
Build score update rows for Google Sheets
Write qualification scores to Google Sheets
